summary.thesis: Representative dashboard fixtures should reflect real comprehension output.
summary.overview: A compact document used to load the dashboard in tests.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.summary: Explains what the fixture is for.
keyPoints: It gives the dashboard stable sample data.

concepts.name: Dashboard Fixture
concepts.definition: A checked-in artifact set used to exercise the dashboard loader.

arguments.claim: Representative fixtures reduce dashboard integration drift.

evidence.content: The loader can parse the same artifact shapes the pipeline emits.

sourceRef.excerpt: loader can parse the same artifact shapes

assumptions: Fixture data remains aligned with core artifact output.

questions.question: Why keep dashboard fixtures in the repo?
questions.answer: They provide a stable input set for loader tests and future UI work.

sourceRefs.excerpt: stable input set for loader tests
